description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and terracotta-colored walls, large glass windows, and multiple balconies and terraces. The house includes a driveway with a parked car, a tiled patio area, and landscaped surroundings with several trees and shrubs. The upper level has a rooftop terrace with a visible palm tree, suggesting a space for relaxation or entertainment. The main entrance is accentuated by a large glass door and a paved walkway. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open spaces and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, terraces, and a mix of white and terracotta exterior walls, surrounded by trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main facade with large windows, a driveway, and a tree in the foreground.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front patio, main entrance, and multiple balconies with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, car, and a clear view of the rooftop terrace with a palm tree.
description_view_3: Direct front view featuring the main entrance, glass door, and paved walkway, with trees flanking the entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, paved steps, and a minimalist overhang, with no porch or decorative columns.
